name: scene_snapshot_determinism
description: Take two scene_snapshot calls back-to-back on an unchanged scene; assert the second is byte-identical to the first (modulo timestamp + snapshot_id). Catches snapshot drift — if the same scene produces different snapshots, scene_diff is unreliable.

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['DetCube', 'DetSphere', 'DetLight']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('teardown ok')
